language.title: Language
language.description: Output language. Use 'en' for English or 'th' for Thai.

word_count.title: Maximum words (optional)
word_count.description: If provided, the article must not exceed this word count. Overrides length preset.

storytelling_style.title: Storytelling Structure
storytelling_style.description: The narrative structure for the article. Leave empty for random selection.

output_format.title: Output Format
output_format.description: Preferred output format. Markdown uses headings and formatting. Plain text is optimized for text-to-speech.

reference_images.title: Reference Images
reference_images.description: Optional array of reference image URLs. When provided, the article should incorporate and describe the marketing materials, campaigns, or branding shown in these images.

response_mode.title: Response Mode
response_mode.description: Choose 'markdown' for readable text or 'cms_json' for structured CMS output.

target_audience.title: Target Audience
target_audience.description: Describe the intended audience for the article.
